title: DfE education and skills agreements and accountability agreements: 2025 to 2026
body: " The Education and Skills Funding Agency (ESFA) closed on 31 March 2025. All activity has moved to the Department for Education (DfE). You should continue to follow these agreements and contracts.   This page contains education and skills agreements for 2025 to 2026. For agreements or contracts relating to other years, see the DfE and ESFA funding agreements and contracts page.  Overview  The agreements or contracts contain a main terms and conditions body and schedules. You can find background information on the structure of the education and skills agreements on the DfE and ESFA funding agreements and contracts page.   The table below sets out the changes made to the 2024 to 2025 agreements or contracts for 2025 to 2026:             Schedule of changes 2025 to 2026    PDF, 601 KB, 134 pages     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email alternative.formats@education.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.
